## 🔄 Community Node Registration

### 📝 Profile Checklist
- [ ] My configuration file is placed securely inside the `nodes/` subfolder.
- [ ] My file is named exactly after my domain followed by `.json`.
- [ ] My `primary_target_url` is correct and publicly reachable.

### 🌐 Node Details
- **Target Domain:** 
- **Failover Use Case:** (e.g., Discord bot server, static blog web app, game server portal)
